response: Define the study's purpose to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from diverse sources to enhance data reliability and validity. Use data entry tools to manage data efficiently and maintain data integrity. Analyze data patterns to identify data trends that support study conclusions. Monitor data quality to prevent data errors that could distort results. Store data securely to protect data confidentiality and accessibility. Interpret data findings to derive data insights relevant to public health. Present data results to inform data-driven policy decisions.
